title: Looking for a 10 hour per week Monday Project Admin
excerpt:

We are a small hospitality group that uses Monday to manage projects at 3 properties.

Translate form requests for new projects into items and subtasks, set up a timeline …

posts.author: hotelnicole (Nicole Dahl)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

We are a small hospitality group that uses Monday to manage projects at 3 properties.

We are looking for someone who can

  1. Translate form requests for new projects into items and subtasks, set up a timeline to ensure the request is completed by goal date, and assign it to the right person based off request and org knowledge (which we will give to you).

  2. Visit Monday daily to check in on task timelines and send out alerts when overdue

  3. Send out weekly SPRINTS to all 10 account users with items overdue, due this week

  4. ID weaknesses and improve them (ie duplicated tasks, abandoned projects, unusable forms)

You can contact me at hello@hotelmccoy.com if interested.

Thank you!!!

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @hotelnicole and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

I am going to send you an email directly - but check out some info on oursite!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer
